offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, duplicate charges cause overspending. We monitor vendor invoices instead of manual invoice review.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Join community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try invoice monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
